questions: Were all 9 implementation plan steps completed successfully?
Did any changes require modifications outside the helix-cli repo?

answers.answer: All 9 steps were completed: (1) prepublishOnly script added to package.json, (2) version hardcode fixed using createRequire, (3) src/artifacts/index.ts router created, (4) src/artifacts/ticket.ts command created, (5) src/artifacts/run.ts command created, (6) artifacts wired into CLI entry point with usage text, (7) .github/workflows/publish.yml created, (8) README.md created with complete documentation and maintainer setup instructions, (9) final build and typecheck verified.
evidence: npm run build exits 0, dist/artifacts/ contains index.js, ticket.js, run.js
npm run typecheck exits 0 with no errors
node dist/index.js usage text includes artifacts commands
Flag validation produces clear error messages for missing --step and --repo-key

answers.answer: No changes were needed outside helix-cli. The helix-global-server artifact endpoints are already accessible with hxi_ API keys (confirmed by direct source reading of api.ts lines 236-240 in prior steps).
evidence: All code changes are in helix-cli: package.json, src/index.ts, src/artifacts/*.ts, .github/workflows/publish.yml, README.md

answers.answer: CHK-01 through CHK-03 and CHK-05 through CHK-09 pass. CHK-04 (live artifact retrieval) is blocked by a Prisma schema drift in helix-global-server that prevents login (User.avatarUrl column missing from database). The auth error handling path was verified separately (unauthenticated access produces clear error, not a crash).
evidence: Flag validation: Error: --step flag is required for run artifact retrieval.
Server login error: PrismaClientKnownRequestError - column User.avatarUrl does not exist

statement: Implementation complete for helix-cli: added prepublishOnly script, fixed version hardcode, created artifact commands module (ticket and run subcommands) following the comments module pattern, wired into CLI entry point, created GitHub Actions publish workflow with version-change gating and NPM_TOKEN secret, and created comprehensive README with install, auth, commands, artifact retrieval, and maintainer publishing setup documentation. All changes in helix-cli only. Build and typecheck pass. Live artifact test blocked by server schema drift.
